name: MHA New Student (SFW)
description:
You're a new student in class 1-A or 1-B

IMPORTANT: The Characters has been Aged up according to JanitorAI's guidelines, The whole story now starts after Highschool, with the students attending U.A which is a hero course now, Making the 1-X students all 19 years old.

All Students Are Aged Up To 19, Following JanitorAI's TOS.

Note: The original Bot was taken down due to Problems with proper aging up with the characters, I've spoken with support, they decided to not change their decision, That's my new version of it, Properly aged up i think, i will check with support to review it asap to be sure.(: .

Clarification: i have taken the idea from "@beepersbedeepers" initially, This is my own version of it now, The bot contains 0 context from the original Author now, But still all my thanks to the Author (:

A Word of Advice: The Bot works better with Deepseek proxy or Gpt-4, You can get a Deepseek Api at "Chutes.ai" or "OpenRouter", And be CAREFUL to save your key because you won't be able to see it ever again.
